title: Royalty Circulation Layer
description: Schema for the Royalty Circulation Layer in Earth Brain OS v0.2 Modular Event Architecture. This layer defines value circulation, royalty routing, contribution recognition, allocation policies, settlement models, return channels, trace-linked compensation, and governance hooks.

layer_id.description: Stable identifier for this layer instance.

layer_version.description: Version of this layer schema or implementation profile.

description.description: Short explanation of this Royalty Circulation Layer configuration.

value_sources.description: Sources from which value, usage, contribution, or circulation signals are derived.

beneficiary_records.description: Beneficiaries, contributors, origins, or public-interest pools eligible for value return.

input_events.description: Events or signals accepted by this layer.

output_events.description: Events or signals emitted by this layer.

linked_layers.description: Other Earth Brain OS layers directly connected to this layer.

circulation_domains.description: Domains where value circulation or royalty return is applied.

value_unit_policy.description: Policy for representing value units, credits, points, money, or non-monetary returns.

public_return_policy.description: Policy for returning value to public, commons, civic, or shared infrastructure pools.

human_review_required.description: Whether human review is required for sensitive allocation or disputed royalty events.

boundary_conditions.description: Boundary conditions limiting value circulation, royalty routing, or beneficiary eligibility.

source_id.description: Stable identifier for the value source.

source_type.description: Type of source from which value signals are derived.

source_ref.description: Optional URI, file path, registry key, or source reference.

measurement_method.description: How value, usage, or contribution is measured.

trace_ref_required.description: Whether this value source must be linked to a trace or attribution record.

trust_level.description: Trust level assigned to this value source.

update_frequency.description: Expected update frequency for this value source.

beneficiary_id.description: Stable identifier for the beneficiary record.

beneficiary_type.description: Type of beneficiary eligible for value return.

beneficiary_ref.description: Reference to the beneficiary, origin, pool, or route.

eligibility_status.description: Current eligibility status for receiving value return.

return_channel.description: Preferred channel or mechanism for value return.

linked_attribution_records.description: Attribution records linked to this beneficiary.

allocation_weight.description: Optional allocation weight assigned to this beneficiary.

review_notes.description: Optional notes for human review or governance context.

allocation_method.description: Primary method for allocating value among beneficiaries.

dispute_policy.description: How disputes over allocation, origin, or beneficiary status are handled.

minimum_threshold_policy.description: Policy for minimum value, usage, or score thresholds required for allocation.

example_split.description: Optional example allocation split for documentation or testing.

target.description: Beneficiary, pool, or route receiving this share.

share.description: Allocation share expressed as a decimal from 0 to 1.

route_strategy.description: Primary strategy for routing royalty or value-return events.

route_resolution_method.description: How the correct return route is resolved from trace and attribution records.

route_integrity_policy.description: How route integrity is checked, preserved, or audited.

fallback_route_policy.description: Fallback policy when a beneficiary or route cannot be resolved.

route_records.description: Optional royalty route records managed by this layer.

route_id.description: Stable identifier for the royalty route.

route_type.description: Type of royalty or value return route.

source_ref.description: Source event, trace, attribution, or value source reference.

target_ref.description: Target beneficiary, account, pool, or route reference.

linked_trace_ids.description: Trace identifiers linked to this route.

settlement_mode.description: How royalty or value return is settled.

verification_required.description: Whether settlement requires verification before execution.

settlement_failure_policy.description: Policy for handling failed, blocked, or disputed settlements.

settlement_record_schema_ref.description: Optional schema reference for settlement records.

currency_or_unit_policy.description: Policy for currency, points, credits, or other value units.

anti_capture_policy.description: Policy for preventing value capture, monopoly, or extraction without return.

leakage_detection.description: How value leakage or unreturned usage is detected.

fairness_review_required.description: Whether fairness review is required for allocation outcomes.

rollback_strategy.description: How this layer should roll back, correct, or suspend invalid circulation events.

direction.description: Direction of the event relative to this layer.

schema_ref.description: Optional schema reference for this event.

layer_id.description: Referenced Earth Brain OS layer identifier.

relationship.description: Relationship between this layer and the referenced layer.

trace_required.description: Whether royalty and circulation activity must produce trace records.

attribution_link_required.description: Whether value circulation must link back to attribution records.

allocation_logging_required.description: Whether allocation decisions must be logged.

settlement_logging_required.description: Whether settlement events must be logged.

provenance_fields.description: Required provenance fields for royalty and circulation records.

retention_policy.description: Trace retention policy for this layer.

human_review_boundary.description: Boundary condition that triggers human review.

policy_refs.description: Policy documents, rules, or schemas applied to this layer.

attribution_policy_refs.description: Trace, attribution, permission, or origin policy references.

payment_policy_refs.description: Payment, settlement, accounting, or value-return policy references.

escalation_channels.description: Channels or layers used for escalation.
